# 08-Upload a NuGet symbol package file [PUT]

`PUT /api/v4/projects/{id}/packages/nuget/symbolpackage`

Uploads a specified NuGet symbol package file (`.snupkg`) for a project.

### Parameters

| Name | Type | In | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `any` | `path` | Yes | The ID or URL-encoded path of the project |

### Request Body (multipart/form-data)

```json
{
  "package": string (required), // The package file to be published (generated by Multipart middleware)
}
```
### Responses

#### 201 - Created

#### 400 - Bad Request

#### 401 - Unauthorized

#### 403 - Forbidden

#### 404 - Not Found
